hero.heading: The Foothill teriyaki bowl.
hero.subheading: A charcoal-grilled teriyaki bowl shop on Foothill Boulevard, north Glendale. House-marinated chicken and beef, hand-cooked rice, fresh slaw, and the kind of teriyaki sauce that makes the bowl worth driving to.

about.label: The shop
about.heading: Charcoal · marinade · time.
paragraphs: Yaki's Original Teriyaki Bowl has been on Foothill Boulevard in north Glendale for years. Charcoal grill, hand-marinated proteins, freshly steamed rice, and a sauce recipe the family hasn't changed since the doors opened.
We do classic teriyaki bowls — chicken, beef, salmon, mixed — plus combo plates, sides, and a kids' menu. Every bowl is built to order. No microwave, no shortcut.
Open seven days. Dine in, takeout, or order ahead by phone. The 267 reviews come from regulars who eat here every week.

services.title: Chicken Teriyaki Bowl
services.description: House-marinated chicken, charcoal-grilled, over steamed rice with fresh slaw and signature sauce.

services.title: Beef Teriyaki Bowl
services.description: Marinated thin-sliced beef, charcoal-seared, rice, slaw, sauce on the side. Heartier portion.

services.title: Salmon Teriyaki Bowl
services.description: Atlantic salmon, marinated and grilled, rice, slaw, fresh lemon. Lighter but filling.

services.title: Combo Plate
services.description: Two proteins of your choice, two sides, rice, sauce. The lunch order regulars know.

services.title: Kids' Bowl
services.description: Smaller portion chicken or beef teriyaki, rice, sweet sauce, side veggies. Ten and under.

services.title: Family Pack
services.description: Four bowls of your choice, family rice, family slaw, sauce on the side. Feeds four.

reviews.name: Greg M.
reviews.text: Yaki's is the only teriyaki I trust in north Glendale. Same bowl, same sauce, same hands for the last six years. The chicken thigh is the best in the area, full stop.

reviews.name: Lisa T.
reviews.text: Bring my four kids here every Friday after soccer. Four bowls, four happy kids, forty bucks, ten minutes. The family pack is real money.

reviews.name: Vahe S.
reviews.text: Walked in cold on a Tuesday and was eating the best teriyaki sauce I've had in LA twelve minutes later. The line moves fast and the bowl is honest.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Yaki's Original Teriyaki, 3750 Foothill Blvd, Glendale, CA 91214

seo.title: Yaki's Original Teriyaki Bowl — Glendale teriyaki on Foothill Blvd
seo.description: A charcoal-grilled teriyaki bowl shop on Foothill Boulevard, Glendale. Chicken, beef, salmon, combo plates. Family-friendly, dine-in or takeout.
